curator: auto (generate_day.py — reals verified verbatim vs source + cross-validated)

quotes.text: These Spanx got my organs fighting for their life. I just burped and I swear to God I tasted my own kidney. It's too damn tight, bro.
quotes.speaker: Cardi B
quotes.context: Instagram Live while getting ready for the Met Gala, 2022
quotes.fake_note: Nails her exact brand of hyper-specific, crude bodily oversharing and casual cadence, making it incredibly hard to distinguish from her actual unhinged red carpet prep videos.

quotes.text: Look, I’m not saying I’m the best golfer out there. But if you talk during my backswing, I will absolutely bounce a Titleist off your motherfucking forehead.
quotes.speaker: Samuel L. Jackson
quotes.fake_note: Channels his trademark profanity and well-known love for golf, but Jackson is famously strict about golf etiquette and wouldn't actually joke about physical injury on the course.

quotes.text: If you're gonna do it, you might as well fuckin' put your name above the door. It's always been about me anyway.
quotes.speaker: Liam Gallagher
quotes.context: Oasis frontman, on going solo and releasing music under his own name rather than a band name, in his trademark blunt interview style (Vice/Noisey interview).

quotes.text: I once asked a Jesuit priest what was the best short prayer he knew. He said, "Fuck it," as in "Fuck it; it's in God's hands."
quotes.speaker: Anthony Hopkins
quotes.context: Anthony Hopkins recounting a Jesuit priest's answer when he asked for the best short prayer — an anecdote he has told publicly, including on Inside the Actors Studio.

quotes.text: I don’t give a flying fuck if it’s a non-stick pan. If you treat it like a goddamn slip-and-slide for cheap butter, your eggs are still gonna taste like absolute dog shit.
quotes.speaker: Gordon Ramsay
quotes.fake_note: Captures his culinary rage and colorful profanity perfectly, but 'slip-and-slide' is a slightly too American-casual reference for his usual hyper-British arsenal of insults.

quotes.text: Why the fuck do I need an app to toast a bagel? It’s a toaster! Just push the little plastic lever down! I don’t need a software update to make bread hot, you psycho!
quotes.speaker: Bill Burr
quotes.context: Monday Morning Podcast, ranting about smart appliances
quotes.fake_note: Matches his exasperated, technophobic comedic persona to a tee, but he actually famously ranted about smart refrigerators and vacuums, not a smart toaster.
